page_metadata.biotools__summary: TraceQC is a R package for quality control (QC) of CRISPR Lineage Tracing Sequence Data. With simple programming, users can create an HTML QC report page and plots for the QC.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: TraceQC is a R package for quality control (QC) of CRISPR Lineage Tracing Sequence Data. With simple programming, users can create an HTML QC report page and plots for the QC.
